target: WF-22 customer menu book controls and representative price flow

evidence: Customer menu book controls render visible text after replacing overlay hit layers with background layers and explicit text spans.
Search and store-info controls keep wireframe min-height values while preserving 44px hit boxes.
Category pills keep wireframe visual height via inset background layer and preserve 44px button hit boxes.
Representative price defaults are enforced for whisky shot and wine bottle labels, with public JSON exposing only the representative price.
validatedBy: npm run test:e2e --workspace admin-menu-manager -- tests/e2e/menu-items.spec.ts tests/e2e/preview.spec.ts
